info.title: Memahami project untuk fitur absensi Supabase

parts.text: anda adalah developer senior full stack dengan pengalaman lebih dari 10 tahun. tolong pahami dahulu project ini secara menyeluruh sebelum nanti saya meminta anda menambah satu fitur yang sangat vital, berikut anda bisa juga cek supabase saya karena fitur vital Tersebut adalah fitur absensi padam project ini.

The user wants me to understand their project thoroughly before they ask me to add a vital feature - an attendance (absensi) feature. They also mentioned I can check their Supabase.

Let me start by exploring the project structure to understand the codebase, then check the Supabase setup.

134: // ║  — those live in index.css (CSS variables) and ConfigProvider tokens   ║
135: // ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
136: 
137: const ISLAMIC_SVG = `url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='120' height='120' viewBox='0 0 120 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' stroke='rgba(201%2C168%2C76%2C0.07)' stroke-width='0.8'%3E%3Cpolygon points='60%2C10 110%2C35 110%2C85 60%2C110 10%2C85 10%2C35'/%3E%3Cpolygon points='60%2C25 95%2C42.5 95%2C77.5 60%2C95 25%2C77.5 25%2C42.5'/%3E%3Cline x1='60' y1='10' x2='60' y2='25'/%3E%3Cline x1='110' y1='35' x2='95' y2='42.5'/%3E%3Cline x1='110' y1='85' x2='95' y2='77.5'/%3E%3Cline x1='60' y1='110' x2='60' y2='95'/%3E%3Cline x1='10' y1='85' x2='25' y2='77.5'/%3E%3Cline x1='10' y1='35' x2='25' y2='42.5'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E")`;
138: 
139: const buildSidebarCSS = (mode: "light" | "dark"): string => {
140:   const isDark    = mode === "dark";
141:   const accent    = isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_BRIGHT; // always bright on dark sider
142:   const popupBg   = isDark ? "#141424"   : "#231B10";
143: 
144:   return `
145: /* ── Cormorant for login serif headings only ── */
146: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@600;700&display=swap');
147: 
148: /* ── PAGE TRANSITION ── */
149: @keyframes alhPageIn {
150:   from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(12px); }
151:   to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
152: }
153: .alh-page-enter { animation: alhPageIn 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both; }
154: 
155: /* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
156:    SIDEBAR — Dark walnut in BOTH light and dark mode
157:    This is the premium design choice: sidebar is
158:    always deep dark for maximum contrast & luxury feel.
159:    index.css handles .dark .ant-layout-sider for dark,
160:    we add the light-mode treatment here.
161: ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
162: .ant-layout-sider {
163:   background: ${D_SIDER} !important;
164:   border-right: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.09) !important;
165:   box-shadow: 4px 0 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.45) !important;
166:   overflow: visible !important;
167: }
168: /* Islamic geometric mosaic — pseudo-element only possible here */
169: .ant-layout-sider::after {
170:   content: '';
171:   position: absolute;
172:   inset: 0;
173:   background-image: ${ISLAMIC_SVG};
174:   background-size: 90px 90px;
175:   opacity: 0.65;
176:   pointer-events: none;
177:   z-index: 0;
178: }
179: .ant-layout-sider > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
180: 
181: /* Collapse/expand trigger */
182: .ant-layout-sider-trigger {
183:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.07) !important;
184:   border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.09) !important;
185:   color: ${accent} !important;
186:   transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s !important;
187: }
188: .ant-layout-sider-trigger:hover {
189:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.14) !important;
190:   color: ${GOLD_BRIGHT} !important;
191: }
192: 
193: /* ── Menu items inside sider — always light text on dark bg ── */
194: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu {
195:   background: transparent !important;
196:   border-inline-end: none !important;
197:   padding: 6px 8px !important;
198: }
199: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item,
200: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-submenu-title {
201:   border-radius: 10px !important;
202:   margin: 2px 0 !important;
203:   height: 42px !important;
204:   line-height: 42px !important;
205:   font-size: 13px !important;
206:   font-weight: 500 !important;
207:   color: rgba(255,255,255,0.46) !important;
208:   transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s !important;
209: }
210: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-title-content {
211:   min-width: 0 !important;
212:   overflow: hidden !important;
213:   text-overflow: ellipsis !important;
214: }
215: .ant-layout-sider:not(.ant-layout-sider-collapsed) .ant-menu-title-content {
216:   white-space: nowrap !important;
217: }
218: .ant-layout-sider:not(.ant-layout-sider-collapsed) .ant-menu-submenu-title {
219:   padding-right: 32px !important;
220: }
221: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item:hover,
222: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-submenu-title:hover {
223:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08) !important;
224:   color: ${GOLD_LIGHT} !important;
225: }
226: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item-selected {
227:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.13) !important;
228:   color: ${GOLD_BRIGHT} !important;
229:   font-weight: 600 !important;
230: }
231: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item-selected .anticon { color: ${GOLD_BRIGHT} !important; }
232: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item .anticon,
233: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-submenu-title .anticon { font-size: 15px !important; }
234: 
235: /* Gold left-accent bar on selected — pseudo-element, only here */
236: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item-selected::before {
237:   content: '';
238:   position: absolute;
239:   left: -8px; top: 10px; bottom: 10px;
240:   width: 3px;
241:   background: linear-gradient(180deg, ${GOLD} 0%, ${GOLD_BRIGHT} 100%);
242:   border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0;
243:   box-shadow: 0 0 10px ${GOLD}70;
244:   pointer-events: none;
245: }
246: /* Hide default Ant active bar */
247: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item::after { display: none !important; }
248: 
249: /* Submenu expand arrow */
250: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-submenu-arrow { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28) !important; }
251: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-submenu-open > .ant-menu-submenu-title .ant-menu-submenu-arrow {
252:   color: ${accent} !important;
253: }
254: /* Group title */
255: .ant-layout-sider .ant-menu-item-group-title {
256:   font-size: 9px !important; font-weight: 800 !important;
257:   letter-spacing: 1.8px !important; text-transform: uppercase !important;
258:   color: rgba(201,168,76,0.36) !important;
259:   padding: 18px 14px 5px !important;
260: }
261: 
262: /* ── Submenu popup (sider collapsed) ── */
263: .ant-menu-submenu-popup .ant-menu {
264:   background: ${popupBg} !important;
265:   border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15) !important;
266:   border-radius: 12px !important;
267:   box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.55) !important;
268:   padding: 6px !important;
269: }
270: .ant-menu-submenu-popup .ant-menu-item {
271:   border-radius: 8px !important; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.50) !important;
272:   font-size: 13px !important; font-weight: 500 !important; margin: 2px 0 !important;
273: }
274: .ant-menu-submenu-popup .ant-menu-item:hover {
275:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.09) !important; color: ${GOLD_BRIGHT} !important;
276: }
277: .ant-menu-submenu-popup .ant-menu-item-selected {
278:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.14) !important; color: ${GOLD_BRIGHT} !important;
279: }
280: 
281: /* ── Modal mask blur ── */
282: .ant-modal-mask {
283:   backdrop-filter: blur(5px) !important;
284:   -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(5px) !important;
285:   background: rgba(0,0,0,0.58) !important;
286: }
287: 
288: /* ── Tabs ink bar ── */
289: .ant-tabs-ink-bar {
290:   background: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important;
291:   border-radius: 2px !important;
292: }
293: .ant-tabs-tab.ant-tabs-tab-active .ant-tabs-tab-btn {
294:   color: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important;
295:   font-weight: 700 !important;
296: }
297: .ant-tabs-tab:hover .ant-tabs-tab-btn {
298:   color: ${isDark ? GOLD_LIGHT : GOLD} !important;
299: }
300: 
301: /* ── Pagination active ── */
302: .ant-pagination-item-active {
303:   border-color: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important;
304:   background: rgba(201,168,76,0.10) !important;
305: }
306: .ant-pagination-item-active a { color: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important; }
307: 
308: /* ── Table sort arrows ── */
309: .ant-table-column-sorter-up.active,
310: .ant-table-column-sorter-down.active { color: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important; }
311: 
312: /* ── Spin color ── */
313: .ant-spin-dot-item { background: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important; }
314: .ant-spin-text     { color: ${isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP} !important; }
315: 
316: /* ── Progress bar ── */
317: .ant-progress-bg {
318:   background: linear-gradient(90deg, ${GOLD} 0%, ${GOLD_BRIGHT} 100%) !important;
319: }
320: 
321: /* ── ProTable toolbar wrap ── */
322: .ant-pro-table-list-toolbar { flex-wrap: wrap !important; gap: 8px !important; }
323: .ant-pro-table-list-toolbar-right { flex-wrap: wrap !important; }
324: 
325: /* ── Text selection ── */
326: ::selection { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.20); color: inherit; }
327: `;
328: };

332: // ║  § 3  ANT DESIGN CONFIG PROVIDER THEME                                  ║
333: // ║  Tokens synced to index.css CSS variable values for consistency          ║

336: const buildPremiumTheme = (mode: "light" | "dark"): ThemeConfig => {
337:   const isDark = mode === "dark";
338: 
339:   return {
340:     algorithm: isDark ? antTheme.darkAlgorithm : antTheme.defaultAlgorithm,
341: 
342:     token: {
343:       // Brand
344:       colorPrimary:             isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP,
345:       colorPrimaryHover:        isDark ? GOLD_LIGHT  : GOLD,
346:       colorPrimaryActive:       isDark ? GOLD        : GOLD_DEEP,
347:       colorLink:                isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP,
348:       colorLinkHover:           isDark ? GOLD_LIGHT  : GOLD,
349: 
350:       // Canvas — matches index.css CSS variable values exactly
351:       colorBgBase:              isDark ? D_BG      : L_BG,
352:       colorBgContainer:         isDark ? D_SURFACE : L_CARD,
353:       colorBgElevated:          isDark ? D_CARD    : "#FFFFFF",
354:       colorBgLayout:            isDark ? D_BG      : L_BG,
355:       colorBgSpotlight:         isDark ? "#1A1A2E" : "#F7F4EE",
356:       colorBgMask:              "rgba(0,0,0,0.56)",
357:       colorFillAlter:           isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.03)",
358:       colorFill:                isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.04)",
359:       colorFillSecondary:       isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.02)",
360: 
361:       // Text — matches index.css --text-* variables
362:       colorText:                isDark ? "#F0EDE5" : "#0A0805",
363:       colorTextSecondary:       isDark ? "#9E9080" : "#6B5F50",
364:       colorTextTertiary:        isDark ? "#5C5248" : "#9E9080",
365:       colorTextQuaternary:      isDark ? "#3A342E" : "#C4B89E",
366:       colorTextLightSolid:      "#FFFFFF",
367: 
368:       // Semantic — matches index.css --success, --danger, --info
369:       colorSuccess:             C_SUCCESS,
370:       colorSuccessBg:           isDark ? "rgba(5,150,105,0.10)"   : "rgba(5,150,105,0.08)",
371:       colorSuccessBorder:       isDark ? "rgba(5,150,105,0.30)"   : "rgba(5,150,105,0.26)",
372:       colorWarning:             GOLD_BRIGHT,
373:       colorWarningBg:           isDark ? "rgba(255,183,0,0.10)"   : "rgba(255,183,0,0.08)",
374:       colorWarningBorder:       isDark ? "rgba(255,183,0,0.28)"   : "rgba(255,183,0,0.24)",
375:       colorError:               C_ERROR,
376:       colorErrorBg:             isDark ? "rgba(220,38,38,0.10)"   : "rgba(220,38,38,0.08)",
377:       colorErrorBorder:         isDark ? "rgba(220,38,38,0.28)"   : "rgba(220,38,38,0.24)",
378:       colorInfo:                C_INFO,
379:       colorInfoBg:              isDark ? "rgba(37,99,235,0.10)"   : "rgba(37,99,235,0.08)",
380:       colorInfoBorder:          isDark ? "rgba(37,99,235,0.28)"   : "rgba(37,99,235,0.24)",
381: 
382:       // Borders — matches index.css --border-* variables
383:       colorBorder:              isDark ? "rgba(201,168,76,0.14)"  : "rgba(201,168,76,0.20)",
384:       colorBorderSecondary:     isDark ? "rgba(201,168,76,0.07)"  : "rgba(201,168,76,0.10)",
385:       colorSplit:               isDark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" : "rgba(0,0,0,0.06)",
386: 
387:       // Interaction
388:       controlOutlineWidth:      3,
389:       controlOutline:           "rgba(201,168,76,0.16)",
390:       controlItemBgHover:       isDark ? "rgba(201,168,76,0.08)" : "rgba(201,168,76,0.07)",
391:       controlItemBgActive:      isDark ? "rgba(201,168,76,0.14)" : "rgba(201,168,76,0.10)",
392:       controlItemBgActiveHover: isDark ? "rgba(201,168,76,0.18)" : "rgba(201,168,76,0.14)",
393: 
394:       // Shape
395:       borderRadius:             10,
396:       borderRadiusLG:           14,
397:       borderRadiusSM:           8,
398:       borderRadiusXS:           6,
399:       borderRadiusOuter:        12,
400: 
401:       // Shadow — matches index.css --shadow-* variables
402:       boxShadow:                isDark
403:         ? "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.50), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.30)"
404:         : "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)",
405:       boxShadowSecondary:       isDark
406:         ? "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.60)"
407:         : "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)",
408: 
409:       // Typography — matches index.css --font-body (DM Sans)
410:       fontFamily:               "'DM Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif",
411:       fontFamilyCode:           "'DM Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace",
412:       fontSize:                 14,
413:       fontSizeLG:               16,
414:       fontSizeSM:               12,
415:       fontSizeXL:               20,
416:       fontSizeHeading1:         32,
417:       fontSizeHeading2:         24,
418:       fontSizeHeading3:         18,
419:       fontSizeHeading4:         16,
420:       fontSizeHeading5:         14,

434:       motionEaseOut:            "cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)",
435:     },
436: 
437:     components: {
438: 
439:       // Menu

441:         itemBg:                 "transparent",
442:         subMenuItemBg:          "transparent",
443:         itemHeight:             42,

454:         itemSelectedBg:         "rgba(201,168,76,0.13)",

457:         darkItemBg:             "transparent",

459:         darkItemColor:          "rgba(255,255,255,0.46)",
460:         darkItemHoverColor:     GOLD_LIGHT,

462:         darkItemSelectedColor:  GOLD_BRIGHT,
463:         darkItemSelectedBg:     "rgba(201,168,76,0.13)",
464:         darkPopupBg:            "#141424",
465:         activeBarWidth:         0,
466:         activeBarBorderWidth:   0,

469:

472:         borderRadius:             10,

474:         borderRadiusSM:           8,

488:       },
489:

493:         activeBorderColor:      isDark ? GOLD_BRIGHT : GOLD_DEEP,
494:         hoverBorderColor:       isDark ? "rgba(201,168,76,0.50)" : GOLD,

496:         borderRadiusLG:         12,

997: const AutoCollapseSider: React.FC<any> = (props) => {
998:   const { siderCollapsed, setSiderCollapsed } = useThemedLayoutContext();
999:   const timerRef = React.useRef<number | null>(null);
1000: 
1001:   const clearTimer = React.useCallback(() => {
1002:     if (timerRef.current !== null) {
1003:       window.clearTimeout(timerRef.current);
1004:       timerRef.current = null;
1005:     }
1006:   }, []);
1007: 
1008:   const scheduleCollapse = React.useCallback(() => {
1009:     clearTimer();
1010:     timerRef.current = window.setTimeout(() => {
1011:       if (window.innerWidth >= 992) {
1012:         setSiderCollapsed(true);
1013:       }
1014:     }, 5000);
1015:   }, [clearTimer, setSiderCollapsed]);
1016: 
1017:   const openAndRefresh = React.useCallback(() => {
1018:     if (window.innerWidth >= 992 && siderCollapsed) {
1019:       setSiderCollapsed(false);
1020:     }
1021:     scheduleCollapse();
1022:   }, [scheduleCollapse, setSiderCollapsed, siderCollapsed]);
1023: 
1024:   React.useEffect(() => {
1025:     scheduleCollapse();
1026:     return clearTimer;
1027:   }, [clearTimer, scheduleCollapse]);
1028: 
1029:   return (
1030:     <div
1031:       onMouseEnter={openAndRefresh}
1032:       onMouseMove={openAndRefresh}
1033:       onFocus={openAndRefresh}
1034:       onClick={openAndRefresh}
1035:     >
1036:       <ThemedSiderV2 {...props} fixed Title={Title} />
1037:     </div>
1038:   );
1039: };

1054: // ✅ FIX #1: PageWrapper menggunakan useLocation().pathname sebagai key
1055: // Tanpa key berbeda, AnimatePresence TIDAK PERNAH trigger transisi halaman
1056: // karena React menganggap children tidak berubah.
1057: const PageWrapper: React.FC<{ children: React.ReactNode }> = ({ children }) => {
1058:   const location = useLocation();
1059:   return (
1060:     <AnimatePresence mode="wait" initial={false}>
1061:       <motion.div
1062:         key={location.pathname}           // ← KEY KRITIS: berubah setiap navigasi
1063:         className="alh-page-enter"
1064:         initial={{ opacity:0, y:12 }}
1065:         animate={{ opacity:1, y:0  }}
1066:         exit={{ opacity:0, y:-8    }}
1067:         transition={{ duration:0.32, ease:[0.22,1,0.36,1] }}
1068:         style={{ width:"100%", minHeight:"100%" }}
1069:       >
1070:         <React.Suspense fallback={<LoadingFallback />}>
1071:           {children}
1072:         </React.Suspense>
1073:       </motion.div>
1074:     </AnimatePresence>
1075:   );
1076: };

1080: // ║  § 6  INNER APP                                                         ║
1081: // ║                                                                         ║
1082: // ║  THE KEY FIX:                                                           ║
1083: // ║  useEffect writes the style tag imperatively into document.head.        ║
1084: // ║  This bypasses React 19's style hoisting & deduplication which caused   ║
1085: // ║  the "white cards after dark re-toggle" bug.                            ║
1086: // ║                                                                         ║
1087: // ║  React 19 JSX <style> tags → hoisted to <head> → deduplicated by        ║
1088: // ║  content hash → mode toggle updates content but React may skip          ║
1089: // ║  re-injection ("already seen this hash" or "already hoisted").          ║
1090: // ║                                                                         ║
1091: // ║  useEffect DOM → always writes current CSS to the element directly,    ║
1092: // ║  guaranteed to run after every mode change before next paint.           ║
1093: // ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
1094: 
1095: const InnerApp: React.FC = () => {
1096:   const { mode } = useColorMode();
1097: 
1098:   // ✅ FIX #2: useMemo — buildPremiumTheme adalah objek besar 100+ token.
1099:   // Tanpa memo, ia dibuat ulang setiap render menyebabkan seluruh
1100:   // ConfigProvider re-render dan semua komponen Ant Design ikut re-render.
1101:   const antThemeConfig = useMemo(() => buildPremiumTheme(mode), [mode]);
1102: 
1103:   useEffect(() => {
1104:     // Get or create the style element
1105:     let el = document.getElementById("alh-sidebar-css") as HTMLStyleElement | null;
1106:     if (!el) {
1107:       el = document.createElement("style");
1108:       el.id = "alh-sidebar-css";
1109:       // Append to end of <head> so it has higher specificity order
1110:       // than any statically loaded stylesheet (including index.css)
1111:       document.head.appendChild(el);
1112:     }
1113:     // Direct textContent write — no React involvement, always current
1114:     el.textContent = buildSidebarCSS(mode);
1115:     // No cleanup needed — we reuse the same element across toggles
1116:   }, [mode]);
1117: 
1118:   return (
1119:     <ConfigProvider theme={antThemeConfig} locale={idID}>
1120:       <AntdApp>
1121:         <DevtoolsProvider>
1122:           {/* ✅ FIX #4: RefineKbarProvider aktifkan command palette (Ctrl+K / ⌘+K) */}
1123:           <RefineKbarProvider>
1124:             <Refine
1125:             dataProvider={dataProvider(supabaseClient)}
1126:             authProvider={authProvider}
1127:             accessControlProvider={accessControlProvider}
1128:             routerProvider={routerBindings}
1129:             notificationProvider={useNotificationProvider}
1130:             options={{
1131:               syncWithLocation:       true,
1132:               warnWhenUnsavedChanges: true,
1133:               useNewQueryKeys:        true,
1134:               projectId:              "alhasanah-admin-panel",
1135:             }}
1136:             resources={resources}
1137:           >
1138:             <Routes>
1139:               {/* LOGIN */}
1140:               <Route element={<Authenticated key="auth-pages" fallback={<Outlet />}><NavigateToResource /></Authenticated>}>
1141:                 <Route path="/login" element={<PremiumLoginPage />} />
1142:               </Route>
1143: 
1144:               {/* PROTECTED */}
1145:               <Route element={
1146:                 <Authenticated key="authenticated-inner" fallback={<CatchAllNavigate to="/login" />}>
1147:                   <ThemedLayoutV2
1148:                     Header={() => <Header sticky />}
1149:                     Sider={(props) => <AutoCollapseSider {...props} />}
1150:                   >
1151:                     {/* ✅ FIX #1: AnimatePresence dipindah ke dalam PageWrapper.
1152:                         PageWrapper menggunakan useLocation().pathname sebagai key
1153:                         sehingga setiap navigasi trigger animasi masuk/keluar. */}
1154:                     <PageWrapper><Outlet /></PageWrapper>
1155:                     <AIConsultantWrapper />
1156:                   </ThemedLayoutV2>
1157:                 </Authenticated>
1158:               }>
1159:                 <Route index element={<DashboardPage />} />
1160:                 <Route path="/instansi" element={<InstansiPage />} />
1161: 
1162:                 <Route path="/santri">
1163:                   <Route index          element={<SantriList />}   />
1164:                   <Route path="create"  element={<SantriCreate />} />
1165:                   <Route path="edit/:id" element={<SantriEdit />}  />
1166:                   <Route path="show/:id" element={<SantriShow />}  />
1167:                 </Route>
1168:                 <Route path="/persebaran-santri" element={<PersebaranSantriPage />} />
1169: 
1170:                 <Route path="/berita">

(Output capped at 50 KB. Showing lines 1-1170. Use offset=1171 to continue.)
</content>

1: import { AccessControlProvider, CanParams } from "@refinedev/core";
2: import { authProvider } from "./authProvider";
3: import { IUserIdentity } from "./types";
4: 
5: // In-memory cache to prevent redundant API calls during a single render cycle or session
6: let cachedRole: string | null = null;
7: let cachedUserId: string | null = null;
8: let identityPromise: Promise<IUserIdentity | null> | null = null;
9: 
10: const getCachedIdentity = async () => {
11:     if (!identityPromise) {
12:         identityPromise = Promise.resolve(authProvider.getIdentity?.() as Promise<IUserIdentity | null>)
13:             .finally(() => {
14:                 identityPromise = null;
15:             });
16:     }
17: 
18:     return identityPromise;
19: };
20: 
21: const getCanonicalResource = (resource?: string) => {
22:     if (!resource) return "";
23:     if (resource === "diklat_list" || resource === "diklat_master") return "diklat";
24:     if (resource === "forum_threads") return "forum_moderation_actions";
25:     if (resource === "alumni_data" || resource === "forum_reports" || resource === "chat_monitoring" || resource === "forum_moderation_actions") return resource;
26:     return resource;
27: };
28: 
29: const backendCommandCenterResources = [
30:     "backend_command_center",
31:     "backend_self_healing",
32:     "backend_diagnostics",
33:     "backend_private_audit_log",
34: ];
35: 
36: export const accessControlProvider: AccessControlProvider = {
37:   can: async ({ resource, action }: CanParams) => {
38:     const identity = await getCachedIdentity();
39:     if (!identity) {
40:       cachedRole = null;
41:       cachedUserId = null;
42:       return { can: false, reason: "Unauthorized" };
43:     }
44: 
45:     let role = "";
46:     if (cachedUserId === identity.id && cachedRole !== null) {
47:       role = cachedRole;
48:     } else {
49:       role = (identity.role || "").toLowerCase();
50:       cachedRole = role;
51:       cachedUserId = identity.id;
52:     }
53: 
54:     const targetResource = getCanonicalResource(resource);
55: 
56:     if (backendCommandCenterResources.includes(targetResource)) {
57:         return role === "super_admin"
58:             ? { can: true }
59:             : { can: false, reason: "Akses ditolak. Backend Command Center khusus super admin." };
60:     }
61: 
62:     // 1. SUPER ADMIN, ROIS, & DEWAN (Bebas Akses Semua Sidebar)
63:     if (["super_admin", "rois", "dewan"].includes(role)) {
64:         if (role === "dewan") {
65:             if (targetResource === "notification_queue" && action === "create") {
66:                 return { can: true };
67:             }
68:             if (targetResource === "rag_knowledge" && ["list", "show"].includes(action || "")) {
69:                 return { can: true };
70:             }
71:             if (["create", "edit", "delete"].includes(action || "")) {
72:                 return { can: false, reason: "Dewan hanya memiliki akses pemantauan (Read-Only)." };
73:             }
74:         }
75:         return { can: true };
76:     }
77: 
78:     // 2. KESANTRIAN
79:     if (role === "kesantrian") {
80:         const allowedKesantrian = [
81:             "data_pesantren_menu",
82:             "kesantrian_menu", "pelanggaran_santri", "kesehatan_santri", "perizinan_santri",
83:             "prestasi_santri", "akademik_menu", "tahfidz_menu", "hafalan_tahfidz", "murojaah_tahfidz", "hafalan_kitab",
84:             "ulangan_menu", "weekly_tests", "ulangan_arsip",
85:             "santri", "diklat", "berita", "komunikasi_menu", "alumni_menu", "alumni_data", "forum_reports", "chat_monitoring",
86:             "forum_threads", "forum_comments", "forum_moderation_actions"
87:         ];
88:         
89:         if (allowedKesantrian.includes(targetResource)) {
90:             return { can: true };
91:         }
92:         return { can: false, reason: "Akses ditolak. Khusus Kesantrian." };
93:     }
94: 
95:     // 3. BENDAHARA
96:     if (role === "bendahara") {
97:         const allowedBendahara = [
98:             "data_pesantren_menu", "keuangan_menu", "ref_jenis_pembayaran", "tagihan_santri", "transaksi_keuangan",
99:             "dompet_menu", "dompet_santri", "dompet_operasional", "dompet_security_audit",
100:             "kantin_management", "pengeluaran", "santri", "akademik_menu", "diklat",
101:             "operasional_menu", "inventaris"
102:         ];
103: 
104:         if (allowedBendahara.includes(targetResource)) {
105:             if (targetResource === "santri" && ["create", "edit", "delete"].includes(action || "")) {
106:                 return { can: false, reason: "Bendahara tidak bisa mengedit data santri." };
107:             }
108:             return { can: true };
109:         }
110:         return { can: false, reason: "Akses ditolak. Khusus Bendahara." };
111:     }
112: 
113:     // 4. KANTIN
114:     if (role === "kantin") {
115:         const allowedKantin = ["dompet_menu", "dompet_santri"];
116:         if (allowedKantin.includes(targetResource)) {
117:             if (["create", "edit", "delete"].includes(action || "")) {
118:                 return { can: false, reason: "Kantin hanya dapat melihat dan memproses transaksi melalui alur QR." };
119:             }
120:             return { can: true };
121:         }
122:         return { can: false, reason: "Akses ditolak. Khusus Kantin." };
123:     }
124: 
125:     return { can: false };
126:   },
127: };

(End of file - total 127 lines)
</content>

parts.text:
Now I have a thorough understanding of the project. Let me summarize what I've found:

1. **Project Overview**: This is a comprehensive Pesantren (Islamic boarding school) management system called "Al-Hasanah Admin Panel" built with:
   - React 19 + TypeScript + Vite
   - Refine (admin panel framework)
   - Supabase (PostgreSQL backend)
   - Ant Design v5 for UI
   - Framer Motion for animations
   - Role-based access control

2. **Current Features**:
   - Santri management (CRUD, show, map visualization)
   - Academic modules: Hafalan Tahfidz, Murojaah, Hafalan Kitab, Ulangan Mingguan
   - Kesantrian: Pelanggaran, Perizinan, Kesehatan, Prestasi
   - Keuangan: Tagihan, Transaksi, Jenis Pembayaran, Pengeluaran
   - Dompet & Kantin: Dompet Santri, Operasional, Kantin Management, Security Audit
   - Alumni: Data Alumni, Forum Moderation, Chat Monitoring
   - Inventaris, Diklat, Berita, Notifications
   - RAG Knowledge Base, AI Assistant (Gemini)
   - Scan QR, Audit Logs, Backend Command Center
   - Multi-role system: super_admin, rois, bendahara, kesantrian, dewan, alumni, wali, kantin

3. **Database Schema (public)**:
   - Core tables: profiles, santri, hafalan_tahfidz, pelanggaran_santri, kesehatan_santri, perizinan_santri, etc.
   - Financial tables: tagihan_santri, transaksi_keuangan, detail_transaksi, pembayaran_tagihan, tarif_khusus_santri
   - Wallet/Dompet tables: dompet_santri, crypto_keystores, wallet_*, transaksi_dompet
   - Alumni/Communication tables: alumni_data, forum_*, chat_*, notification_queue
   - Academic tables: mata_pelajaran, nilai_santri, question_bank, weekly_tests
   - Inventaris: inventaris, kategori_barang, lokasi_aset
   - Diklat: peserta_diklat, config_diklat, master_kitab

4. **Attendance (Absensi) Status**:
   - There's NO attendance page in the current codebase
   - There's a migration file (`tmp_migrations/20260519091000_saas_multi_tenant_foundation.sql`) that has attendance tables but under `tenant_alhasanah` schema (multi-tenant), not `public` schema

Now I have a clear picture of what the user wants:

1. **Hybrid attendance**: Both shalat (5x daily) AND academic sessions
2. **QR Code Scan** as primary method (leveraging existing ScanQR feature)
3. **Statuses**: Standard (Hadir, Izin, Sakit, Alfa, Telat) + Extended (Cuti, Dispensasi, Representasi)

Let me now create a comprehensive plan for implementing this vital attendance feature. I need to consider:

1. **Database Schema** - Create attendance tables in `public` schema (not the multi-tenant one)
2. **Types** - Add TypeScript interfaces
3. **Pages** - List, Create (QR scan session), Show/Detail, Reports
4. **Resources** - Add to resources.tsx
5. **Access Control** - Add permissions
6. **Integration** - Connect with existing ScanQR feature
7. **API/Queries** - Supabase queries for attendance

Let me create a detailed plan.

Based on your requirements, here's my comprehensive implementation plan for the **Absensi (Attendance) Feature**:

---

## 📋 Implementation Plan: Fitur Absensi Vital

### 1. **Database Schema** (New Migration)
Create tables in `public` schema (aligned with existing structure):

```sql
-- Enum for attendance status
CREATE TYPE attendance_status AS ENUM (
  'HADIR', 'IZIN', 'SAKIT', 'ALPA', 'TERLAMBAT', 
  'CUTI', 'DISPENSASI', 'REPRESENTASI'
);

-- Enum for session type
CREATE TYPE session_type AS ENUM (
  'SHALAT_SUBUH', 'SHALAT_DHUHUR', 'SHALAT_ASHAR', 
  'SHALAT_MAGHRIB', 'SHALAT_ISYA',
  'AKADEMIK_PAGI', 'AKADEMIK_SIANG', 'AKADEMIK_SORE'
);

-- Attendance Sessions (jadwal absensi per hari/sesi)
CREATE TABLE attendance_sessions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  session_date DATE NOT NULL,
  session_type session_type NOT NULL,
  kelas VARCHAR(10), -- NULL = semua kelas
  jurusan VARCHAR(20), -- NULL = semua jurusan
  starts_at TIME NOT NULL,
  ends_at TIME NOT NULL,
  qr_code_token VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL, -- untuk QR scan
  qr_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_by UUID REFERENCES profiles(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Student Attendance Records
CREATE TABLE santri_attendance (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  session_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES attendance_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  santri_nis TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES santri(nis) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  status attendance_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ALPA',
  check_in_at TIMESTAMPTZ, -- waktu scan QR / input manual
  recorded_by UUID REFERENCES profiles(id), -- ustadz/admin yg input
  note TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE(session_id, santri_nis)
);

-- Indexes for performance
CREATE INDEX idx_attendance_sessions_date ON attendance_sessions(session_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_attendance_sessions_qr ON attendance_sessions(qr_code_token);
CREATE INDEX idx_santri_attendance_session ON santri_attendance(session_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_santri_attendance_santri ON santri_attendance(santri_nis);
CREATE INDEX idx_santri_attendance_status ON santri_attendance(status);

-- RLS Policies
ALTER TABLE attendance_sessions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE santri_attendance ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- Policies: kesantrian/rois/super_admin can manage; all authenticated can read
```

### 2. **TypeScript Types** (`src/types.tsx`)
```typescript
export type AttendanceStatus = 'HADIR' | 'IZIN' | 'SAKIT' | 'ALPA' | 'TERLAMBAT' | 'CUTI' | 'DISPENSASI' | 'REPRESENTASI';
export type SessionType = 'SHALAT_SUBUH' | 'SHALAT_DHUHUR' | 'SHALAT_ASHAR' | 'SHALAT_MAGHRIB' | 'SHALAT_ISYA' | 'AKADEMIK_PAGI' | 'AKADEMIK_SIANG' | 'AKADEMIK_SORE';

export interface IAttendanceSession {
  id: string;
  session_date: string;
  session_type: SessionType;
  kelas: string | null;
  jurusan: string | null;
  starts_at: string;
  ends_at: string;
  qr_code_token: string;
  qr_expires_at: string | null;
  is_active: boolean;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  // Joins
  creator?: IProfile;
  attendance_records?: ISantriAttendance[];
}

export interface ISantriAttendance {
  id: string;
  session_id: string;
  santri_nis: string;
  status: AttendanceStatus;
  check_in_at: string | null;
  recorded_by: string | null;
  note: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  // Joins
  session?: IAttendanceSession;
  santri?: ISantri;
  recorder?: IProfile;
}
```

### 3. **Pages to Create** (`src/pages/absensi/`)
| Page | Path | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `AbsensiList` | `/absensi` | Dashboard: filter by date, session type, kelas; summary cards |
| `AbsensiCreate` | `/absensi/create` | Buat sesi absensi baru (generate QR code) |
| `AbsensiEdit` | `/absensi/edit/:id` | Edit sesi (extend QR expiry, ubah jam) |
| `AbsensiDetail` | `/absensi/detail/:id` | Detail sesi: daftar santri + status, quick edit inline |
| `AbsensiRekap` | `/absensi/rekap` | Laporan: per santri, per kelas, per bulan, export Excel/PDF |
| `AbsensiScan` | `/absensi/scan/:token` | **Public page** untuk santri scan QR (no auth required) |

### 4. **Resources Registration** (`src/utility/resources.tsx`)
```typescript
{ name:"absensi_menu", meta:{ label:"Absensi", icon:<CheckCircleOutlined /> } },
{ name:"absensi_sessions", list:"/absensi", create:"/absensi/create", edit:"/absensi/edit/:id",
  meta:{ label:"Kelola Sesi", parent:"absensi_menu", icon:<CalendarOutlined /> } },
{ name:"absensi_rekap", list:"/absensi/rekap",
  meta:{ label:"Rekap Absensi", parent:"absensi_menu", icon:<BarChartOutlined /> } },
```

### 5. **Access Control** (`src/accessControlProvider.ts`)
Add to `kesantrian` role: `absensi_menu`, `absensi_sessions`, `absensi_rekap`
Add to `bendahara`/`rois`/`super_admin`: full access
Add to `dewan`: read-only access to rekap

### 6. **QR Scan Integration** (Leverage existing `ScanQR` page)
- Modify `ScanQR.tsx` to detect attendance QR tokens (`/absensi/scan/:token`)
- Public attendance scan page validates token, checks expiry, records attendance via Supabase RPC
- Auto-redirect to success/error page

### 7. **Supabase Utilities** (`src/utility/attendance.ts`)
- `generateQRToken()` - secure random token
- `createSession()` - with QR generation
- `recordAttendance()` - upsert with conflict handling
- `getRekapSantri()` - aggregated queries for reports
- `getRekapKelas()` - class-level summaries

### 8. **Features Breakdown**

| Feature | Priority | Details |
|---------|----------|---------|
| **CRUD Sesi Absensi** | P0 | Create/edit/list sessions with QR generation |
| **QR Scan Attendance** | P0 | Santri scan → auto-record (offline-capable with sync) |
| **Manual Input (Ustadz)** | P0 | Bulk entry per kelas, quick status toggle |
| **Rekap Harian/Mingguan/Bulanan** | P1 | Filter by santri/kelas/jurusan, export Excel/PDF |
| **Dashboard Summary Cards** | P1 | Hadir/Izin/Sakit/Alfa counts real-time |
| **Notifikasi ke Wali** | P2 | Optional: push/email saat santri ALPA/IZIN |
| **Integrasi Perizinan** | P2 | Auto-set IZIN jika ada perizinan approved yg tumpang tindih |

---

### 📁 **File Structure to Create**
```
src/
├── pages/
│   └── absensi/
│       ├── list.tsx
│       ├── create.tsx
│       ├── edit.tsx
│       ├── detail.tsx
│       ├── rekap.tsx
│       └── scan.tsx          # Public QR scan page
├── components/
│   └── absensi/
│       ├── AttendanceQRGenerator.tsx
│       ├── AttendanceStatusBadge.tsx
│       ├── AttendanceBulkInput.tsx
│       └── RekapFilters.tsx
├── utility/
│   └── attendance.ts         # Supabase queries & helpers
└── types.tsx                 # Add attendance types
```

---

### ⚡ **Implementation Order**
1. **Migration** → Apply SQL to Supabase
2. **Types** → Add to `types.tsx`
3. **Utility** → `attendance.ts` with all queries
4. **Components** → Reusable UI components
5. **Pages** → List, Create, Detail, Rekap, Scan
6. **Resources + AccessControl** → Register & secure
7. **LazyPages + App.tsx** → Wire up routes
8. **Test & Verify** → QR scan flow, rekap accuracy

2: import { supabaseClient } from "./utility/supabaseClient";

4: 
5: // ── AUTH CACHE & SINGLETON ──
6: // Mencegah error "lock request is aborted" dengan memastikan hanya ada 1 request getUser aktif
7: let identityCache: IUserIdentity | null = null;
8: let identityPromise: Promise<IUserIdentity | null> | null = null;
9: 
10: const clearIdentityCache = () => {
11:   identityCache = null;
12:   identityPromise = null;
13: };
14: 
15: export const authProvider: AuthBindings = {
16:   login: async ({ email, password }) => {
17:     try {
18:       const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
19:         email: email.trim(),
20:         password,
21:       });
22: 
23:       if (error) {
24:         console.error("Supabase Auth Error:", error.message);
25:         return { 
26:           success: false, 
27:           error: { message: error.message, name: "Login Error" }

29:       }
30: 
31:       if (data.session) {
32:         // Reset cache setelah login sukses
33:         clearIdentityCache();
34: 
35:         const { data: profile } = await supabaseClient
36:           .from("profiles")
37:           .select("role, is_active")
38:           .eq("id", data.session.user.id)
39:           .single();
40: 
41:         if (!profile?.is_active) {
42:           await supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
43:           return {
44:             success: false,
45:             error: { message: "Akun ini sudah dinonaktifkan.", name: "Inactive Account" },
46:           };
47:         }
48: 
49:         let targetUrl = "/";

51: 
52:         if (role === "kesantrian") targetUrl = "/santri";
53:         else if (role === "bendahara") targetUrl = "/tagihan";

57:       }
58: 
59:       return { success: false, error: { message: "Gagal memuat sesi", name: "Session Error" } };
60:     } catch (err: any) {
61:       return { success: false, error: { message: err.message || "Login gagal", name: "Unknown Error" } };
62:     }
63:   },
64: 
65:   logout: async () => {
66:     clearIdentityCache();
67:     const { error } = await supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
68:     if (error) return { success: false, error };
69:     return { success: true, redirectTo: "/login" };
70:   },
71: 
72:   check: async () => {
73:     try {
74:         const { data: { session }, error: sessionError } = await supabaseClient.auth.getSession();
75:         if (sessionError || !session) {
76:           clearIdentityCache();
77:           return { authenticated: false, redirectTo: "/login" };
78:         }
79: 
80:         const { data: profile, error: profileError } = await supabaseClient
81:           .from("profiles")

83:           .eq("id", session.user.id)
84:           .maybeSingle();
85: 
86:         if (profileError) {
87:           console.warn("Auth check profile lookup failed; keeping current session:", profileError.message);
88:           return { authenticated: true };
89:         }
90: 
91:         if (!profile?.is_active) {
92:           await supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
93:           clearIdentityCache();
94:           return { authenticated: false, redirectTo: "/login" };
95:         }
96: 
97:         return { authenticated: true };
98:     } catch (e) {
99:         console.warn("Auth check failed transiently; preserving route until Supabase recovers:", e);
100:         return { authenticated: true };
101:     }
102:   },
103:

111:     return identity?.role || null;

115:     // 1. Jika data sudah ada di RAM, langsung kembalikan (Sangat Cepat)
116:     if (identityCache) return identityCache;
117: 
118:     // 2. Jika ada request yang sedang berjalan, tunggu request yang sama (Singleton)
119:     // Ini mencegah error "DOMException: The lock request is aborted"
120:     if (identityPromise) return identityPromise;
121: 
122:     identityPromise = (async () => {

125:         const user = session?.user ?? null;

140:         }
141: 
142:         if (data && !data.is_active) {
143:           await supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
144:           identityCache = null;
145:           return null;
146:         }
147: 
148:         const result: IUserIdentity = {
149:           id: user.id,
150:           name: data?.full_name || user.email || "User",
151:           avatar: data?.foto_url || user.user_metadata?.avatar_url,
152:           role: (data?.role as TRole) || "dewan",
153:           scopeGender: (data?.akses_gender as TGenderScope) || "ALL", 
154:           scopeJurusan: (data?.akses_jurusan as TJurusanScope) || "ALL"
155:         };
156: 
157:         identityCache = result;
158:         return result;
159:       } catch (e) {
160:         console.error("Error in getIdentity:", e);
161:         return null;
162:       } finally {
163:         // Reset promise agar request baru bisa dibuat jika nanti dibutuhkan
164:         identityPromise = null;
165:       }
166:     })();
167: 
168:     return identityPromise;
169:   },
170: };

451:   background-size: 40px 40px;
452:   animation: scanGrid 3s linear infinite;
453: }
454: 
455: /* Laser sweep */
456: .sqr-laser {
457:   position:absolute; left:0; right:0; height:2px; z-index:5;
458:   background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, ${CYAN}, ${CYAN_DIM}, ${CYAN}, transparent);
459:   box-shadow: 0 0 8px ${CYAN}, 0 0 20px ${CYAN}90, 0 0 40px ${CYAN}50;
460:   animation: laserSweep 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
461: }
462: 
463: /* Corner brackets */
464: .sqr-corner {
465:   position:absolute; width:36px; height:36px;
466:   border-style:solid; border-color:${GOLD_BRIGHT};
467:   transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
468:   animation: cornerPulse 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;
469: }
470: .sqr-corner.success {
471:   border-color: ${CYAN};
472:   width:22px; height:22px;
473:   box-shadow: 0 0 14px ${CYAN}80;
474:   animation: none;
475: }
476: .sqr-tl { top:14px; left:14px; border-width:3px 0 0 3px; border-radius:6px 0 0 0; }
477: .sqr-tr { top:14px; right:14px; border-width:3px 3px 0 0; border-radius:0 6px 0 0; }
478: .sqr-bl { bottom:14px; left:14px; border-width:0 0 3px 3px; border-radius:0 0 0 6px; }
479: .sqr-br { bottom:14px; right:14px; border-width:0 3px 3px 0; border-radius:0 0 6px 0; }
480: 
481: /* Center crosshair */
482: .sqr-cross {
483:   position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
484:   width:18px; height:18px; z-index:4; pointer-events:none;
485: }
486: .sqr-cross::before,.sqr-cross::after {
487:   content:''; position:absolute; background:${GOLD_BRIGHT}80; border-radius:2px;
488: }
489: .sqr-cross::before { width:1px; height:100%; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); }
490: .sqr-cross::after  { width:100%; height:1px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); }
491: 
492: /* Scanner lib override */
493: .sqr-wrap video, .sqr-wrap svg { width:100%!important; height:100%!important; object-fit:cover!important; }
494: 
495: /* Status bar at bottom of scanner */
496: .sqr-statusbar {
497:   position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:6;
498:   background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.82), transparent);
499:   padding:20px 16px 14px;
500:   display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
501: }
502: 
503: /* Result avatar ring */
504: .sqr-avatar-ring {
505:   padding:4px;
506:   background:conic-gradient(from 0deg, ${GOLD}, ${GOLD_BRIGHT}, ${GOLD_LIGHT}, ${GOLD});
507:   border-radius:50%;
508:   animation:goldRing 2.8s ease-in-out infinite;
509: }
510: 
511: /* Glitch heading */
512: .sqr-glitch { animation:glitch 8s infinite; }
513: 
514: /* Scanning dots */
515: .sqr-dot1,.sqr-dot2,.sqr-dot3 { display:inline-block; animation:fadeDot 1.2s infinite; }
516: .sqr-dot2 { animation-delay:.3s; }
517: .sqr-dot3 { animation-delay:.6s; }
518: 
519: /* SPP timeline */
520: .sqr-spp-item { transition:background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; }
521: .sqr-spp-item:hover { border-color:${GOLD}45!important; }
522: 
523: /* Scrollbar */
524: .sqr-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { width:3px; }
525: .sqr-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:rgba(201,168,76,0.28); border-radius:4px; }
526: 
527: /* Info row */
528: .sqr-info-row { transition:background 0.12s; border-radius:10px; }
529: .sqr-info-row:hover { background:${isDark?"rgba(201,168,76,0.06)":"rgba(201,168,76,0.05)"}; }
530: `;
531: 
532:   // ── SECTION BUILDERS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
533: 
534:   /* Mode pill */
535:   const ModePill = ({ value, label, icon, active, color }: {
536:     value: ScanMode; label: string; icon: React.ReactNode; active: boolean; color: string;
537:   }) => (
538:     <button
539:       onClick={() => { setScanMode(value); handleReset(); }}
540:       style={{
541:         flex:1, height:42, cursor:"pointer",
542:         borderRadius:11,
543:         background: active
544:           ? `linear-gradient(135deg, ${color}22, ${color}14)`
545:           : "transparent",
546:         border: active ? `1.5px solid ${color}45` : `1.5px solid transparent`,
547:         color: active ? color : t.textMuted,
548:         fontWeight:700, fontSize:12, letterSpacing:"0.4px",
549:         display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"center", gap:7,
550:         transition:"all 0.2s", boxShadow: active ? `0 0 16px ${color}20` : "none",
551:       }}
552:     >
553:       <span style={{fontSize:15}}>{icon}</span>
554:       {label}
555:     </button>
556:   );
557: 
558:   /* Info row */
559:   const InfoRow = ({ label, value, copyKey }: { label:string; value?:string|null; copyKey?:string }) => {
560:     if (!value) return null;
561:     return (
562:       <div className="sqr-info-row" style={{
563:         display:"flex", alignItems:"flex-start", gap:10, padding:"9px 10px",
564:         marginBottom:2,
565:       }}>
566:         <div style={{
567:           fontSize:10, fontWeight:800, letterSpacing:"0.7px", textTransform:"uppercase",
568:           color:t.textMuted, minWidth:110, flexShrink:0, paddingTop:1,
569:         }}>{label}</div>
570:         <div style={{ flex:1, fontSize:13, color:t.text, fontWeight:500, lineHeight:1.45 }}>
571:           {value}
572:         </div>
573:         {copyKey && (
574:           <button onClick={() => handleCopy(copyKey, value)} style={{
575:             border:"none", background:"transparent", cursor:"pointer",
576:             color: copiedField===copyKey ? "#34D399" : t.textMuted,
577:             padding:4, borderRadius:6, transition:"color .15s", flexShrink:0,
578:           }}>
579:             {copiedField===copyKey ? <CheckOutlined style={{fontSize:11}}/> : <CopyOutlined style={{fontSize:11}}/>}
580:           </button>
581:         )}
582:       </div>
583:     );
584:   };
585: 
586:   /* SPP Timeline item */
587:   const SppItem = ({ tagihan }: { tagihan: any }) => {
588:     const isLunas   = tagihan.status === "LUNAS";
589:     const isCicilan = tagihan.status === "CICILAN";
590:     const color     = isLunas ? "#34D399" : isCicilan ? GOLD_BRIGHT : "#F87171";
591:     return (
592:       <div className="sqr-spp-item" style={{
593:         background: isDark
594:           ? `${color}0C`
595:           : `${color}08`,
596:         border:`1px solid ${color}28`,
597:         borderRadius:12, padding:"12px 16px", marginBottom:10,
598:         display:"flex", alignItems:"center", justifyContent:"space-between", gap:12,
599:       }}>
600:         <div style={{flex:1, minWidth:0}}>
601:           <div style={{fontWeight:700, fontSize:13, color:t.text, marginBottom:4}}>
602:             {tagihan.deskripsi_tagihan || "Tagihan SPP"}
603:           </div>
604:           <div style={{fontSize:11, color:t.textMuted}}>
605:             Jatuh tempo: {tagihan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo
606:               ? dayjs(tagihan.tanggal_jatuh_tempo).format("DD MMM YYYY")
607:               : "-"}
608:           </div>
609:         </div>
610:         <div style={{textAlign:"right", flexShrink:0}}>
611:           <div style={{fontFamily:"monospace", fontWeight:800, fontSize:14, color, marginBottom:4}}>
612:             {fmt(tagihan.nominal_tagihan || 0)}
613:           </div>
614:           <span style={{
615:             display:"inline-flex", alignItems:"center", gap:4,
616:             fontSize:10, fontWeight:800, letterSpacing:"0.8px",
617:             padding:"3px 9px", borderRadius:20,
618:             background:`${color}18`, color, border:`1px solid ${color}35`,
619:           }}>
620:             {isLunas ? <CheckCircleOutlined/> : isCicilan ? <ClockCircleOutlined/> : <CloseCircleOutlined/>}
621:             {isLunas ? "LUNAS" : isCicilan ? `Sisa ${fmt(tagihan.sisa_tagihan||0)}` : "BELUM"}
622:           </span>
623:         </div>
624:       </div>
625:     );
626:   };
627: 
628:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
629:   // RENDER
630:   // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
631:   return (
632:     <div style={{ background:t.bg, minHeight:"100vh", paddingBottom:80 }}>
633:       <style>{css}</style>
634: 
635:       {/* ── HERO HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}
636:       <div style={{
637:         background: isDark
638:           ? "linear-gradient(135deg, #0C0A04 0%, #14120A 50%, #060A08 100%)"
639:           : "linear-gradient(135deg, #1C1610 0%, #2A2015 50%, #161008 100%)",
640:         borderRadius:24, padding:"28px 32px", marginBottom:24, position:"relative",
641:         overflow:"hidden", border:`1px solid ${GOLD}16`,
642:         boxShadow: isDark
643:           ? `0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.65), inset 0 1px 0 ${GOLD}12`
644:           : "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)",
645:       }}>
646:         {/* Gold top line */}
647:         <div style={{position:"absolute",top:0,left:0,right:0,height:2,
648:           background:`linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,${GOLD_BRIGHT},${GOLD},transparent)`,opacity:.85}}/>
649:         {/* Cyber grid bg */}
650:         <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,
651:           backgroundImage:`linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px)`,
652:           backgroundSize:"48px 48px",pointerEvents:"none"}}/>
653:         {/* Glow */}
654:         <div style={{position:"absolute",top:-60,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",
655:           width:400,height:200,

657: 
658:         <div style={{position:"relative",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",
659:           justifyContent:"space-between",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:16}}>
660:           {/* Title */}
661:           <div>
662:             <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:"4px",textTransform:"uppercase",
663:               color:GOLD, marginBottom:6}}>
664:               ◆ SISTEM IDENTIFIKASI TERPADU ◆
665:             </div>

667:               margin:0, fontFamily:"monospace",

674:               SANTRI · DIKLAT · VERIFIKASI INSTAN
675:             </p>
676:           </div>
677: 
678:           {/* Session Stats */}
679:           <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
680:             {[

682:               {label:"GAGAL",    val:sessionFail, color:"#F87171"},
683:               {label:"TOTAL",    val:sessionOK+sessionFail, color:GOLD_BRIGHT},
684:             ].map(stat=>(

690:                 <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:"1px",color:"rgba(245,237,216,0.45)",marginTop:3}}>{stat.label}</div>
691:               </div>
692:             ))}
693:           </div>
694:         </div>
695:       </div>
696: 
697:       {/* ── MAIN LAYOUT ─────────────────────────────────────────── */}
698:       <div style={{
699:         display:"grid",
700:         gridTemplateColumns:"clamp(280px,35%,420px) 1fr",
701:         gap:20,
702:         alignItems:"start",
703:       }}>
704:         {/* ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
705:             LEFT: SCANNER PANEL
706:         ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
707:         <div>
708:           {/* Mode switcher */}
709:           <div style={{
710:             background:t.card, border:`1px solid ${t.border}`,
711:             borderRadius:14, padding:8, marginBottom:14,
712:             display:"flex", gap:6,

717:           </div>
718: 
719:           {/* Scanner box */}

721:             {/* Cyber grid */}

723: 
724:             {isScanning ? (

753:                       SCANNING

798:                       MENGAMBIL DATA<span className="sqr-dot1">.</span><span className="sqr-dot2">.</span><span className="sqr-dot3">.</span>
799:                     </div>
800:                   </>
801:                 )}
802: 
803:                 {scanState==="success" && (

821:                       IDENTIFIKASI BERHASIL
822:                     </div>
823:                     <button onClick={handleReset} style={{
824:                       background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${GOLD},${GOLD_BRIGHT})`,

828:                     }}>
829:                       <ReloadOutlined/> SCAN BARU
830:                     </button>
831:                   </motion.div>

833: 
834:                 {scanState==="error" && (
835:                   <motion.div
836:                     initial={{scale:0.7,opacity:0}}

867: 
868:           {/* Manual NIS input */}

909:           {/* Scan History button */}
910:           <button
911:             onClick={()=>setShowHistory(true)}
912:             disabled={history.length===0}
913:             style={{

923:           >

926:               <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:t.textSub}}>Riwayat Scan Sesi Ini</span>
927:             </div>
928:             <div style={{
929:               fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:t.accent,
930:               background:`${t.accent}16`,border:`1px solid ${t.accent}28`,
931:               borderRadius:20,padding:"2px 8px",
932:             }}>{history.length}</div>
933:           </button>
934:         </div>
935: 
936:         {/* ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
937:             RIGHT: RESULT PANEL
938:         ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */}
939:         <div>
940:           <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
941: 
942:             {/* ── IDLE / EMPTY ── */}
943:             {(!santriData && !diklatData && !invoiceData && scanState!=="loading") && (
944:               <motion.div key="empty"
945:                 initial={{opacity:0,y:10}} animate={{opacity:1,y:0}}
946:                 exit={{opacity:0,y:-8}} transition={{duration:.3}}
947:               >
948:                 <div style={{
949:                   background:t.card, border:`1px dashed ${t.border}`,
950:                   borderRadius:20, minHeight:400,
951:                   display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",
952:                   alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
953:                   padding:"40px 24px",
954:                 }}>
955:                   {/* Big scan icon */}
956:                   <div style={{
957:                     width:100,height:100,borderRadius:28,marginBottom:20,
958:                     background: isDark?"rgba(201,168,76,0.06)":"rgba(201,168,76,0.05)",
959:                     border:`1px solid ${GOLD}20`,
960:                     display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
961:                     boxShadow:`0 0 40px ${GOLD}12`,
962:                   }}>
963:                     <ScanOutlined style={{fontSize:46,color:`${t.accent}60`}}/>
964:                   </div>
965:                   <div style={{fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,
966:                     color:t.textSub,letterSpacing:"2px",marginBottom:8}}>
967:                     MENUNGGU SCAN
968:                   </div>
969:                   <div style={{fontSize:12,color:t.textMuted,textAlign:"center",maxWidth:280,lineHeight:1.6}}>
970:                     {scanState==="error"
971:                       ? <span style={{color:"#F87171"}}>{errorMsg}</span>
972:                       : "Arahkan QR Code santri atau kartu diklat ke kamera, atau gunakan input manual."}
973:                   </div>
974: 
975:                   {/* QR format hints */}
976:                   <div style={{
977:                     marginTop:24,display:"flex",gap:10,flexWrap:"wrap",justifyContent:"center",
978:                   }}>
979:                     {[
980:                       {prefix:"SANTRI:",  color:GOLD_BRIGHT, label:"NIS / Kartu Santri"},
981:                       {prefix:"DIKLAT:",  color:CYAN,        label:"Kartu Diklat/Pasaran"},
982:                       {prefix:"INV:",     color:"#F59E0B",   label:"Validasi Tagihan"},
983:                     ].map(f=>(
984:                       <div key={f.prefix} style={{
985:                         padding:"6px 12px",borderRadius:10,fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,
986:                         background:`${f.color}10`,border:`1px solid ${f.color}25`,color:f.color,
987:                       }}>
988:                         <code style={{background:"transparent"}}>{f.prefix}</code> {f.label}
989:                       </div>
990:                     ))}
991:                   </div>
992:                 </div>
993:               </motion.div>
994:             )}
995: 
996:             {/* ── LOADING SKELETON ── */}
997:             {scanState==="loading" && (
998:               <motion.div key="loading"
999:                 initial={{opacity:0}} animate={{opacity:1}} exit={{opacity:0}}>
1000:                 <div style={{
1001:                   background:t.card,border:`1px solid ${t.border}`,borderRadius:20,padding:28,
1002:                 }}>
1003:                   <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexDirection:"column",gap:16,minHeight:300}}>
1004:                     <div style={{
1005:                       width:72,height:72,borderRadius:18,
1006:                       background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${GOLD}18,${CYAN}10)`,
1007:                       border:`2px solid ${GOLD}35`,
1008:                       display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
1009:                       boxShadow:`0 0 30px ${GOLD}22`,
1010:                     }}>
1011:                       <Spin size="large"/>
1012:                     </div>
1013:                     <div style={{fontFamily:"monospace",color:t.accent,fontSize:12,letterSpacing:"2px"}}>
1014:                       MENGAMBIL DATA<span className="sqr-dot1">.</span><span className="sqr-dot2">.</span><span className="sqr-dot3">.</span>
1015:                     </div>
1016:                   </div>
1017:                 </div>
1018:               </motion.div>
1019:             )}
1020: 
1021:             {/* ── SANTRI RESULT ── */}
1022:             {santriData && (scanState==="success") && (
1023:               <motion.div key="santri-result"
1024:                 initial={{opacity:0,y:20,scale:0.97}}
1025:                 animate={{opacity:1,y:0,scale:1}}
1026:                 exit={{opacity:0,y:-10}}
1027:                 transition={{duration:.45,ease:[.22,1,.36,1]}}
1028:               >
1029:                 <div style={{
1030:                   background:t.card,border:`1px solid ${t.border}`,
1031:                   borderRadius:20,overflow:"hidden",
1032:                 }}>
1033:                   {/* Card header — identity */}
1034:                   <div style={{
1035:                     background: isDark
1036:                       ?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0E0C07 0%,#161208 100%)"
1037:                       :"linear-gradient(135deg,#2A1F0E 0%,#3A2C18 100%)",
1038:                     padding:"24px 28px",
1039:                     position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",
1040:                   }}>
1041:                     {/* Subtle grid */}
1042:                     <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,
1043:                       backgroundImage:`linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(201,168,76,0.05) 1px,transparent 1px)`,
1044:                       backgroundSize:"32px 32px",pointerEvents:"none"}}/>
1045:                     <div style={{position:"relative",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:20}}>
1046:                       {/* Avatar with gold ring */}
1047:                       <div className="sqr-avatar-ring" style={{flexShrink:0}}>
1048:                         <Avatar
1049:                           src={santriData.foto_url}
1050:                           size={88}
1051:                           icon={<UserOutlined/>}
1052:                           style={{
1053:                             border:"3px solid #0E0C07",
1054:                             background: isDark?"#1C1810":"#F0EDE5",
1055:                             display:"block",
1056:                           }}
1057:                         />
1058:                       </div>
1059:                       {/* Name + tags */}
1060:                       <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
1061:                         <div style={{fontSize:11,color:GOLD,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:"2px",
1062:                           textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>
1063:                           DATA SANTRI TERIDENTIFIKASI
1064:                         </div>
1065:                         <h2 style={{
1066:                           margin:"0 0 10px",fontSize:"clamp(16px,2vw,22px)",
1067:                           fontWeight:800,color:"#F5EDD8",lineHeight:1.2,
1068:                         }}>
1069:                           {santriData.nama || santriAlias(santriData.nis)}
1070:                         </h2>
1071:                         <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
1072:                           {[
1073:                             {label:`NIS: ${santriData.nis}`,color:"#60A5FA",icon:<IdcardOutlined/>},
1074:                             {label:`Kelas ${santriData.kelas}`,color:GOLD_BRIGHT,icon:<BookOutlined/>},
1075:                             {label:santriData.jurusan,color:"#A78BFA",icon:null},
1076:                             {
1077:                               label:santriData.status_santri||"AKTIF",
1078:                               color:santriData.status_santri==="AKTIF"?"#34D399":"#F87171",
1079:                               icon: santriData.status_santri==="AKTIF" ? <CheckCircleOutlined/> : <CloseCircleOutlined/>
1080:                             },
1081:                           ].filter(x=>x.label&&x.label!=="null").map((tag,i)=>(
1082:                             <span key={i} style={{
1083:                               display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4,
1084:                               padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:20,
1085:                               fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:"0.6px",
1086:                               background:`${tag.color}18`,color:tag.color,border:`1px solid ${tag.color}30`,
1087:                             }}>
1088:                               {tag.icon}{tag.label}
1089:                             </span>
1090:                           ))}
1091:                         </div>
1092:                       </div>
1093:                     </div>
1094:                   </div>
1095: 
1096:                   {/* Tab switcher: INFO / SPP */}
1097:                   <div style={{
1098:                     display:"flex",borderBottom:`1px solid ${t.divider}`,
1099:                     background:t.surface,
1100:                   }}>
1101:                     {[{key:"info",label:"Profil & Identitas",icon:<UserOutlined/>},
1102:                       {key:"spp", label:"Status Syahriah", icon:<WalletOutlined/>}].map(tb=>(
1103:                       <button key={tb.key}
1104:                         onClick={()=>setViewTab(tb.key as any)}
1105:                         style={{
1106:                           flex:1,padding:"13px 16px",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",
1107:                           background:"transparent",
1108:                           color:viewTab===tb.key?t.accent:t.textMuted,
1109:                           fontWeight:700,fontSize:12,letterSpacing:"0.3px",
1110:                           borderBottom: viewTab===tb.key?`2px solid ${t.accent}`:"2px solid transparent",
1111:                           transition:"all .15s",
1112:                           display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:6,
1113:                         }}>
1114:                         <span style={{fontSize:14}}>{tb.icon}</span>{tb.label}
1115:                       </button>
1116:                     ))}
1117:                   </div>
1118: 
1119:                   {/* Tab content */}
1120:                   <div className="sqr-scroll" style={{maxHeight:460,overflowY:"auto",padding:"16px 20px"}}>
1121: 
1122:                     {/* ── INFO TAB ── */}
1123:                     {viewTab==="info" && (
1124:                       <div>
1125:                         <div style={{
1126:                           fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,letterSpacing:"1.5px",textTransform:"uppercase",
1127:                           color:t.textMuted,marginBottom:12,
1128:                           display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,
1129:                         }}>

import React, { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from "react";

state.title: src/pages/scanQR/ScanQR.tsx

parts.text:
Now I have a good understanding of the ScanQR page. It already has a sophisticated QR scanner with multiple modes (santri, diklat, tagihan). I can leverage this for attendance scanning.

Now let me check the existing Edge Functions to understand the pattern for creating new ones.

Now I have a good understanding of the existing architecture. Let me now create a comprehensive plan for the Absensi feature. Let me address the user's questions:

1. Migration - not applying directly, will discuss first ✓
2. QR Scan - based on accessControlProvider, role `kesantrian` should have access, `dewan` read-only
3. Export - Excel + PDF for batch/personal
4. Date format - Indonesian "Senin, 14 Juni 2026"
5. Scaling concern - need to address indexing, partitioning, archiving

Let me create a comprehensive plan document.
Sekarang saya punya pemahaman lengkap tentang arsitektur project. Mari saya buat **Plan Implementasi Absensi yang Matang & Scalable**.

todos.content: Analisis arsitektur existing (auth, accessControl, ScanQR, Edge Functions)
Rancang database schema dengan partitioning strategy
Rancang UI/UX pages (List, Create, Detail, Rekap, Scan)
Rancang Edge Function untuk auto-archive bulanan

parts.text: Now let me create a comprehensive plan document for the user.

pertanyaan 1 : langsung ke development.  pertanyaan 2 : subdomain.  pertanyaan 3 : untum notifikasi anda harus mempelajari dahulu fitur notifikasi wali yang ada di project saya ini baik dari segi database agar ketika santri ALPHA  notifikasi langsung masuk ke daftar antrian notifikasi dan terkirim ke aplikasi android wali santri.   pertanyaan 4 : lebih baik query langsung RPC untuk admin jika mau rekap manual, tapi tetap jalankan MV + Cron untuk rekap automatis bulanan.   pertanyaan 5 : saya tidak butuh QR masal. pertanyaan 6 : ya buat auto-generate..  saya sudah ubah ke mode build, anda bisa melakukan perubahannya sekarang

The user has confirmed the decisions and switched me to build mode. Let me summarize the key decisions:

1. **Migration**: Apply to development branch first
2. **QR Scan**: Subdomain (scan.alhasanah.id/absensi/...)
3. **Notifications**: Need to study existing notification system for wali - when santri ALPA, notification goes to queue and sent to Android app
4. **Rekap**: RPC for manual admin rekap + MV + Cron for automated monthly rekap
5. **QR Massal**: Not needed
6. **Auto-generate**: Yes, create santri_attendance rows with ALPA status when session created

Now I need to:
1. First study the existing notification system (database + edge functions)
2. Create the migration SQL
3. Apply to development branch
4. Build all the features

Let me start by examining the notification system.
